Dialog.name: MSG_INFO_ALL_MAT_SELL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All Valuables in your possession will be sold.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EXIT_FIRST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 3 1002 1086 0}If you want to buy anything, you know where to find me. Drop by anytime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_FIRST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16425 0 0}Now, then... I don't have that much, but you should be able to find what you need.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 3 1000 1086 0}I don't have that much, but you should be able to find what you need.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_SALE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 3 1001 1086 0}Running a little sale today. See if anything catches your eye.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 3 1001 0 0}Don't worry, I won't ask what you want any of this for.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}I just do what I think is right.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16420 0 0}I'm ashamed to admit it, but there isn't much we adults can do for you when it really counts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now, then... I don't have that much, but you should be able to find what you need.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16405 0 0}This is all I can do for you right now, but don't you be reckless, ya hear?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16416 0 0}Some people with Apathy Syndrome have suddenly returned to normal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't know how it happened, but I do know you guys did it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16412 0 0}You have my thanks, too. I gotta tip my hat to ya—you guys are impressive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16420 0 0}The number of people infected with Apathy Syndrome seems to be increasing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}I thought it would decrease, but I guess that was just wishful thinking...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16406 0 0}We could be in for the long haul, so feel free to get prepped here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16417 0 0}Those girls from your school who had Apathy Syndrome seem to have regained their senses.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm guessing you all had a hand in that, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now, then... Is there anything you need?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_06
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16402 0 0}Lately, there's been an increase in Apathy Syndrome cases among pairs of men and women.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's all I know, but could there be a reason for it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}In any case, feel free to take a look around if you need anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_07
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16416 0 0}Those Apathy Syndrome cases in pairs came to an abrupt halt.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Some have even regained consciousness. I'm sure you've all been at it again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, what can I get you today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_09
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 0 0 0}Apathy Syndrome may be on the decline, but people are still on edge.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16419 0 0}I mean, who can blame them? Rumors spread, and the media fans the flames.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway... Pick what you like.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16427 0 0}Apathy Syndrome may be a serious issue, but the people panicking over it are also a handful.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}The world is always like that. Powerlessness is a knave.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well... Take your time and look around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16407 0 0}There's been another spike in Apathy Syndrome cases. The entire city is in a panic.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's times like these when the police need to step up, but the reality is we've got no recourse.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}In any case... take your time and browse.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16416 0 0}You know your buddy, the kid with the hat? Iori, was it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}He seemed real down about something. Did something happen?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, anyway... What'll you take today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_12
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's been a lotta talk about Apathy Syndrome both online and in the news lately.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16427 0 0}The rumors have gotten out of hand. Some say it's contagious, others insist it's a foreign conspiracy...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, I'm just going to do what I can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_13
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16407 0 0}I heard about the incident. What a terrible thing to happen...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}You guys are putting your lives on the line, and I can only gripe about my ineptitude...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}At the very least, I want to do what I can to help you out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_14
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16402 0 0}I hear this is gonna be the last stand.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, then... prepare yourself as much as possible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_15
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16420 0 0}Seeing as you're here, I take it things aren't over yet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}With the Kirijo Group in the state they're in, there's no telling how things will turn out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}All I can do right now is fulfill my duties.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_16
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16424 0 0}I won't pry for details, but I know something happened to you guys.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Don't dwell on it for too long. No one blames you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16405 0 0}This is all I can do for you, but I don't want you pushing yourselves too hard.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_17
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16401 0 0}The look on your face tells me you're ready to finish off one last big job.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}No matter what you're up against, I have faith you can pull this off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16406 0 0}Spare no preparation and make sure you come back alive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WEAPON_GREET_TALK_SE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16415 0 0}You'd best be equipped for all contingencies. It's anyone's guess what could happen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}If there's anything you don't need, I can take it off your hands.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REQUEST_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}The missing person's family sent a thank-you letter.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DISAPPEAR_REQUEST_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That reminds me, didn't that supposed Santa[n]tell me to do something good for the world?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should show him this letter...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hm? Oh, it's something that missing schoolgirl brought in as a reward to the one who found her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}There was a lot about the case that stymied us on the force, so I figured you guys were involved.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16415 0 0}...This money is from the salaryman who went missing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}I couldn't make out the full picture from questioning him, but you're the ones who saved him, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16406 0 0}The police can't accept gifts, so this is yours. Use it wisely.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16416 0 0}They found that missing girl the other day. I tried questioning her, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Her answers didn't make any sense. She said some kids saved her from an attack by a black thing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16412 0 0}She left a reward with us, so I'll hand it over to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16402 0 0}I've got something for you, so here you go.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a token of gratitude the missing housewife left with us a short while ago.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16411 0 0}You rescued her, right? I won't ask questions. Just take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16416 0 0}They found that missing schoolboy the other day. I tried questioning him, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}His answers didn't make any sense. He said some kids saved him from an attack by a black thing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16406 0 0}He left a reward with us, so I'll hand it over to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_06
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a token of gratitude the missing housewife left with us a short while ago.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16411 0 0}You rescued her, right? I won't ask questions. Just take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_07
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}See those rocks with the strange patterns on them? The man they found the other day left them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16427 0 0}I'm fine with one or two, but this many just gets in the way of our work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}...You saved him, didn't ya? Just go ahead and take them all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16417 0 0}They found that missing office lady the other day. I tried questioning her, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}She wasn't making any sense. She said some kids saved her from an attack by a black thing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16412 0 0}She left a reward with us, so I'll hand it over to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_09
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}For some reason, we just got a delivery of a bunch of mysterious dolls... You know anything about this?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Your face says you do. Just take them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16416 0 0}They found that missing schoolgirl the other day. I tried questioning her, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Her answers didn't make any sense. She said some kids saved her from an attack by a black thing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16412 0 0}She left a reward with us, so I'll hand it over to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16402 0 0}They found a missing person the other day... Oddly, he handed over a big wad of cash.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Seems he was the president of some company. He was pretty damn low-profile for someone so self-important.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16406 0 0}...Anyway, the police can't accept reward money, so you can have it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_12
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16416 0 0}They found that grade school kid the other day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}She brought this here as a way of saying, "Thanks."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_13
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16402 0 0}They found that missing guy the other day. I tried questioning him, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}His answers didn't make any sense. He said some kids saved him from an attack by a black thing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16412 0 0}He left a reward with us, so I'll hand it over to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_14
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16417 0 0}They found that missing woman the other day. I tried questioning her, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Her answers didn't make any sense. I'm guessing her memory's fuzzy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16411 0 0}At any rate, she left this as a token of her appreciation, so I think you should have it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_15
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16402 0 0}Take this box. Something tells me it's for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a token of gratitude the missing salaryman left with us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16406 0 0}You rescued him, right? I won't ask questions. Just take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_16
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16417 0 0}They found that missing woman the other day. I tried questioning her, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Her answers didn't make any sense. She said some kids saved her from an attack by a black thing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16412 0 0}She left a reward with us, so I'll hand it over to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_17
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16415 0 0}This is a token of gratitude the woman who was missing brought us, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}These coins look awfully pricey. Kids today sure are loaded...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whatever. You guys saved her, so they're yours.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_18
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16402 0 0}Take this box. Something tells me it's for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hm? Oh, it's something that missing woman brought in as thanks to the one who found her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16411 0 0}You rescued her, right? I won't ask questions. Just take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_19
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16401 0 0}Will you take a look at this for me?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}The girl they found the other day brought this in as a gift...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16413 0 0}It looks like... some sort of liquid. By the looks of the container, I'm guessing you're supposed to drink it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}She was murmuring something about fortune telling, so maybe it has something to do with that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16406 0 0}...Anyway, just take it. We can't have something this suspicious at the police station.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISAPPEAR_REWARD_20
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16416 0 0}They found that missing student the other day. I tried questioning him, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}His answers didn't make any sense. He said some kids saved him from an attack by a black thing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16412 0 0}He left a reward with us, so I'll hand it over to you.[n]{f 1 1}
